ABOUT US
At age 15, Rosalia Ruiz started selling traditional food an snacks in her home state of origin in Oaxaca, Mexico. In 1995, she had the opportunity to travel to the USA with her husband, Oscar Arteaga, arriving at Dekalb County in Georgia. During a visit to a local flea market, Rosalia came up with the idea of selling traditional Mexican food. With very few resources and a very basic grasp of the English language, they began to sell tamales.
After two years, Rosalia and Oscar saved up enough money to buy a food truck, which was located on North Harston Rd, at Stone Mountain. After years of struggles and perseverance, they were able to expand their business to a brick and mortar location in Clayton County on 6768 Tara Boulevard.  For five years, “Taqueria La Oaxaqueña” operated at that location, where they earned the loyalty of their clients with their delicious traditional Oaxacan food.
As the clientele grew, so did the need for a bigger space, so they moved to the current location at 605 Mt Zion Rd in Jonesboro. Their menu includes Oaxacan Mole, Tlayudas, Quesillo, Tacos, Burritos, Tamales, Seafood, and many more traditional Mexican dishes.
Taqueria La Oaxaqueña has received awards from the Atlanta Journal-Constitution and The Zagat. It is also included in the list of top 50 restaurants in Atlanta by Atlanta Magazine and has been voted best Mexican Restaurant in Atlanta by Creative Loafing.
LOCATION
605 Mt Zion Rd

lunch | Taqueria La Oaxaqueña
LUNCH SPECIALS
One Sope, One Tamal
LUNCH SPECIALS

LUNCH SPECIALS
Two Mexican Tacos
Two Tacos on corn tortilla with your choice of meat, topped with chopped onion and cilantro. Side of rice and refried beans.
Two American Tacos
Two Tacos on flour tortilla with your choice of meat, topped with fresh lettuce, tomatoes, shredded cheese and sour cream. Side of rice and refried beans.
Quesadilla
Flour Tortilla stuffed with mozzarella cheese and your choice of grilled chicken or steak, grilled bell peppers, mushrooms and onions. Side of rice, refried beans, lettuce, tomatoes and avocado.
Chipotle Burrito
Flour Tortilla stuffed with grilled chicken or steak, cheese, chipotle peppers and sour cream. Side of rice and refried beans.
Fajita Nachos
Crispy corn tortilla chips covered with melted cheese on a bed of refried beans, grilled onions and bell peppers. Add grilled steak or chicken.
Flautas
Three crispy corn taquitos stuffed with shredded chicken and topped with fresh lettuce, tomatoes, sour cream and avocado. Side of rice, jalapeño toreado and refried beans.
1/4 Pollo Rostizado
Leg & thigh or breast & wing, marinated overnight. Topped with grilled onions and jalapeños. Side of rice and refried beans, 3 tortillas.
House Salad
A generous portion of fresh mixed salad with lettuce, red tomatoes, carrots, celery, onions, bell peppers, mushrooms and your choice of grilled steak or chicken. Blue cheese or ranch.
VEGETARIAN OPTIONS AVAILABLE
Costillas en Salsa
Pork ribs simmered in a homemade green tomatillo sauce or red guajillo pepper sauce. Side of rice and refried beans, 3 tortillas.
Traditional Mole
Mrs. Rosa’s special take on this traditional Oaxacan delicacy. One piece of chicken. Side of rice and refried beans, 3 tortillas.
Two Sopes
Two corn patties topped with your choice of meat, refried beans, lettuce, queso fresco and sour cream. Side of rice, jalapeño toreado and refried beans.
Huarache
Large corn patty topped with your choice of meat, refried beans, lettuce, queso fresco and sour cream. Side of rice, jalapeño toreado and refried beans.
One Sope, One Tamal
One Sope (see number 11) and One Tamal, your choice of green (chicken) or red (pork) wrapped in corn husk. Side of rice, jalapeño toreado and refried beans.
Two Enchiladas
Two corn tortillas stuffed with your choice of chicken, steak or cheese and topped with green or red salsa, cream and cheese. Side of rice and refried beans.
Taco Salad
Large crispy flour tortilla topped with refried beans, rice, chicken or steak, lettuce, pico de gallo, cheese and sour cream.
Chile Relleno
One large poblano pepper, battered and stuffed with cheese. Comes with red salsa (on top or on the side) and rice and beans.
VEGETARIAN OPTIONS AVAILABLE
